# Novelcraft Author OS

AI-powered novel writing system with intelligent context management and knowledge base integration.

## Topics

novelcraft author-os ai-writing novel-writing knowledge-management context-management tauri typescript react sqlite writing-assistant

## Description

An intelligent novel writing system featuring AI-powered context management, knowledge base integration, timeline tracking, and comprehensive diagnostics. Built with React, TypeScript, and Tauri.

## Website

https://github.com/gypg/novelcraft-author-os

## Features

- 🤖 AI Writing Assistant with multi-agent support
- 📚 Knowledge Base System with automatic retrieval
- 🎯 Real-time Context Diagnostics
- 📖 World Building Tools (Truth Files, Timeline, Knowledge Graph)
- 🎨 Rich Text Editor with chapter management
- 🔒 Content redaction for copyright protection

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript
- Desktop: Tauri 2
- Database: SQLite
- Testing: Vitest
- State: Zustand
- Editor: TipTap
